messages.body: Hello Kim
I hope you are doing well.
Hey Kim, I truly understand your point. Let me check with my team and I would get back to you by Monday.
Thank you.

Hi Kanak. Can you check with your team and let me know if we're we still on track to end my subscription? The information you've shared is redundant and Zoca isn't the right solution to help my business grow.
No worries.
Hey Kim, Surely we can schedule it for 17th October’ 2025 at 2PM PST.
